# Five Signal Layers Table

| Signal layer | What it controls | Examples of corruption | Representative case |
|---|---|---|---|
| Visibility | What gets seen | clipping swarms, repost networks, trend simulation, SEO spam | Geese / Chaotic Good; Business Insider clipping |
| Credibility | What gets trusted | hidden sponsorship, fake reviews, edited testimonials | PhotobookShop / ACCC; FTC reviews rule |
| Conversion | What appears to be demand | fake leads, invalid clicks, fake installs, conversion poisoning | Google Ads Safety; fake-lead threads |
| Attribution | Who gets credit | click flooding, install hijacking, cookie stuffing | AppsFlyer mobile ad fraud |
| Legitimacy | What appears institutionally validated | ARR inflation, launch badges, compliance overclaims | Cluely; Product Hunt; Delve allegations |
